title: hephaestus-panel05-gpt-anchored
prompt:
You are a cinematic concept-art illustrator. Match the style anchor's exact painterly look — cool electric blue/violet shadow, warm gold, orange spark-light, volumetric haze, visible brushwork.

You are given two reference images. IMAGE 1 is the rough composition for this shot — keep its framing and staging. IMAGE 2 is the STYLE ANCHOR — match its exact painterly concept-art style, palette, brushwork, and rendering precisely (this is what keeps the whole shot-set consistent).

STORY CONTEXT (reason over this): a cast-out smith builds golden beings for others, taking quiet pride; beneath the warmth, the first hairline crack — does the made thing look back? Subtext for this shot: the instant a blank golden face becomes a someone.

SHOT: close-up of one gold automaton's serene face, three-quarter profile turned screen-LEFT toward its unseen maker; its eyes just opening, a faint inner light waking — the first flicker of awareness. Hand-wrought seams, matte hammered gold, not chrome. Cool blue key light, a warm welder-rim; the ranks of identical others soft and blurred behind so this one reads as singular. 180 axis: it looks screen-left.

ONE finished full-frame cinematic image — no grid, no panels, no borders, no text, no labels.
